title: Kobellian Form Wooper [Cobblemon Addon]
description: Adds Minecraft-inspired regional Wooper forms for Cobblemon!
body:
# Journey deep into the lush caves of your Minecraft world, and look for some new colorful regional forms of Wooper!

Having settled down within the hidden, subterranean ecosystem of lush caves in the Kobel region, these Wooper have adapted to combat forces unfamiliar to their home region. While their stats remain the same, Kobellian Wooper have gained the Fairy-type to replace their previous Ground-type. The local flora also contributes to their diet which mutates their pigmentation, resulting in **many different color variants!**

Oh, and before you leave, let me tell you a little something. They say once in a blue moon, a lucky explorer could even encounter **an elusive blue variant, glimmering** under the light of the glow berries! Don't know if that's true, but do you dare to prove it wrong? Have fun collecting each color variant and march on with your army of Wooper!

## IMPORTANT TO NOTE
- This addon requires the [Cobblemon mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) to work, preferably Cobblemon 1.6. It might or might not work with older versions.
- This addon might not work with other addon packs that implement alternate Wooper variants.
- This addon consists of a resource pack and a data pack. This is **NOT** a mod.
- Kobel region (unofficial name by me) Wooper design by the amazing Toa on Discord.

## TUTORIAL FOR NEWBIES!
1. Download the latest version of the addon pack from Modrinth, and you need to EXTRACT the zip. You will get a Resourcepack and a Datapack zip.

2. Go to your server / world files directory and look for the 'resourcepack' folder.  Drop the Resource pack zip there.

3. Then you need to look for your world's save data folder ( its usually named like, "saves" or "world" ) and look for the 'datapack' folder inside. Drop the Datapack zip there

4. If you want to spawn Kobellian Wooper, you will need to specify which variant you want or else it will not work. Example commands would be:
/spawnpokemon wooper kobellian=lucy
/spawnpokemon wooper kobellian=gold

5. If you are experiencing problems, visit me at the support thread in the Cobblemon server [https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1329736131213787136](https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1329736131213787136)
